title: Stronghold Crusader HD

notes: Minimizing the game causes instant crash. Requires "steal my focus" Gnome extension to start on Gnome Shell, otherwise minimizes on start and crashes.
title: Stronghold Crusader HD

notes:
Like another user (one month ago) stated:

Mouse capturing in full-screen windows has to be enabled to fix right/bottom scrolling.
Enabling virtual desktop emulation fixes alt-tab problems.

To enable both workarounds, run: `env WINEPREFIX=<steam-library-path>/steamapps/compatdata/40970/pfx winecfg` replacing <steam-library-path> with the location of your Steam library. Switch to the "Graphics" tab, and check the 1st (scrolling fix) and 4th (atl-tab fix) checkbox. Make sure to set the desktop resolution to your screen resolution.
title: Stronghold Crusader HD

notes: alt-tab mess things up, all other works great!

title: Stronghold Crusader HD

notes:
Worked perfectly out of the box for singleplayer, alt-tab works smoothly as well. The performance is great.
To get multiplayer working (only tested LAN multiplayer), I had to install protontricks (https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks) and run 'protontricks 40970 directplay'.

notes: Game works out of the box on Proton. I copied dgvoodoo2 files and enabled in winecfg d3d8 as native, then the game worked with DXVK too.

notes:
Work's very good with some tweaks.  
An other user suggested: Mouse capturing in full-screen windows has to be enabled to fix right/bottom scrolling. Enabling virtual desktop emulation fixes alt-tab problems. To enable both workarounds, run: `env WINEPREFIX=<steam-library-path>/steamapps/compatdata/40970/pfx winecfg` replacing <steam-library-path> with the location of your Steam library. Switch to the "Graphics" tab, and check the 1st (scrolling fix) and 4th (atl-tab fix) checkbox. Make sure to set the desktop resolution to your screen resolution.

This fix worked for me.
